31.reason: [Variable 'end' may be used uninitialized if all digits after decimal are zero, leading to undefined behavior or incorrect exponent]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Variable 'end' may be used uninitialized if all digits after decimal are zero, leading to undefined behavior or incorrect exponent]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Variable 'end' may be used uninitialized if the inner loop doesn't execute (e.g., if all digits after decimal are zero). Also, logic for exponent calculation is flawed.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Variable 'end' may be used uninitialized if the input after the decimal point contains only zeros (though problem states no trailing zeros, but logic still assumes a non-zero digit exists). Also, exponent calculation is incorrect: should be -(record - point) not -end + point.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Variable 'end' may be used uninitialized if the input after the decimal point contains only zeros (e.g., "0.000"), causing undefined behavior or incorrect output. Also, logic for exponent calculation is flawed.]
